name: Splitter
description: Resizable split pane for horizontal/vertical layouts.

api.name: Splitter
api.description: Resizable split pane for horizontal/vertical layouts.

records.name: SplitterContext
records.signature:
SplitterContext(
        string GroupId,
        SplitterOrientation Orientation,
        List<object> Children,
        Action<object> RegisterChild,
        Action<object> UnregisterChild,
        Func<object, double, Task> ResizeNeighbors
    )

examples.title: Three Panes — Sidebar + Main + Aside
examples.code:
<Splitter Orientation="Splitter.SplitterOrientation.Horizontal"
          Class="min-h-[260px] rounded-lg border">
    <SplitterPane Size="20" MinSize="10">Sidebar</SplitterPane>
    <SplitterDivider />
    <SplitterPane Size="55">Main</SplitterPane>
    <SplitterDivider />
    <SplitterPane Size="25" MinSize="10">Aside</SplitterPane>
</Splitter>

examples.title: Nested — Horizontal containing Vertical
examples.code:
<Splitter Orientation="Splitter.SplitterOrientation.Horizontal"
          Class="h-[360px] rounded-lg border">
    <SplitterPane Size="25">Files</SplitterPane>
    <SplitterDivider />
    <SplitterPane Size="75">
        <Splitter Orientation="Splitter.SplitterOrientation.Vertical" Class="h-full">
            <SplitterPane Size="65">Code</SplitterPane>
            <SplitterDivider />
            <SplitterPane Size="35">Output</SplitterPane>
        </Splitter>
    </SplitterPane>
</Splitter>

mdSummary:
# Splitter

Resizable split pane for horizontal/vertical layouts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/splitter

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Splitter | Orientation | `SplitterOrientation` | `SplitterOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Splitter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Splitter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Splitter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SplitterDivider | Context | `Splitter.SplitterContext` | `default!` |  |
| SplitterDivider | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SplitterDivider | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SplitterPane | Context | `Splitter.SplitterContext` | `default!` |  |
| SplitterPane | Size | `double` | `` |  |
| SplitterPane | MinSize | `double` | `10` |  |
| SplitterPane | MaxSize | `double` | `90` |  |
| SplitterPane | Collapsible | `bool` | `` |  |
| SplitterPane | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SplitterPane | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SplitterPane | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Splitter) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SplitterPane) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `SplitterDivider`, `SplitterPane`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Splitter.SplitterContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()
- `ThemeService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Splitter />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`

## Files
- `UI/Splitter/Splitter.razor`
- `UI/Splitter/SplitterDivider.razor`
- `UI/Splitter/SplitterPane.razor`
